title: Mflorio
compiled_truth: Mflorio is an external contact at [Turn](companies/turn). Over the corpus period (1999-11-22 to 2001-12-21), Mflorio sent 14 and received 168 emails, totalling 182 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jdasovic](people/jdasovic) (8), [Kmccrea](people/kmccrea-sablaw) (7), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (7), [Wbooth](people/wbooth-booth-law) (6), [Smutny](people/smutny-iepa) (6).
